# Hippius - Decentralized S3-Compatible Storage

> Hippius is a decentralized cloud storage platform that provides a fully S3-compatible API backed by Arion distributed storage and a custom Substrate blockchain. Any S3 client works with Hippius out of the box.

## Quick Start

1. Create account at console.hippius.com (Google or GitHub OAuth)
2. Add credits via Console > Billing (credit card via Stripe, or TAO)
3. Create S3 credentials via Console > S3 Storage > Create Master Token — save your Access Key ID (hip_...) and Secret Key
4. Configure your S3 client with the connection details below and start uploading

IMPORTANT: Hippius uses its own account system. ETH wallets, TAO wallets,
and Polkadot browser extensions are NOT used for S3 storage access.
TAO can be used only to pay for credits, not for authentication.

## S3 Connection Details

- Endpoint: https://s3.hippius.com
- Region: decentralized
- Signature: AWS Signature V4
- Addressing style: path

## Common Operations (AWS CLI)

Configure credentials:

    export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID="hip_your_key"
    export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY="your_secret"
    export AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="decentralized"

Create bucket:

    aws s3 mb s3://my-bucket --endpoint-url https://s3.hippius.com

Upload file:

    aws s3 cp file.txt s3://my-bucket/file.txt --endpoint-url https://s3.hippius.com

Download file:

    aws s3 cp s3://my-bucket/file.txt file.txt --endpoint-url https://s3.hippius.com

List objects:

    aws s3 ls s3://my-bucket/ --endpoint-url https://s3.hippius.com

Generate presigned URL (1 hour):

    aws s3 presign s3://my-bucket/file.txt --endpoint-url https://s3.hippius.com --expires-in 3600

## Client Configurations

### Python (minio)

    from minio import Minio
    client = Minio(
        "s3.hippius.com",
        access_key="hip_your_key",
        secret_key="your_secret",
        secure=True,
        region="decentralized",
    )

### Python (boto3)

    import boto3
    from botocore.config import Config
    s3 = boto3.client(
        "s3",
        endpoint_url="https://s3.hippius.com",
        aws_access_key_id="hip_your_key",
        aws_secret_access_key="your_secret",
        region_name="decentralized",
        config=Config(signature_version="s3v4", s3={"addressing_style": "path"}),
    )

### JavaScript (minio)

    const Minio = require("minio");
    const client = new Minio.Client({
        endPoint: "s3.hippius.com",
        port: 443,
        useSSL: true,
        accessKey: "hip_your_key",
        secretKey: "your_secret",
        region: "decentralized",
    });

## Supported S3 Operations

- Bucket: CreateBucket, DeleteBucket, ListBuckets, HeadBucket
- Object: PutObject, GetObject, HeadObject, DeleteObject, CopyObject
- List: ListObjects, ListObjectsV2
- Multipart: InitiateMultipartUpload, UploadPart, CompleteMultipartUpload, AbortMultipartUpload
- Tags: PutObjectTagging, GetObjectTagging, DeleteObjectTagging, PutBucketTagging, GetBucketTagging, DeleteBucketTagging
- ACL: PutBucketAcl, GetBucketAcl, PutObjectAcl, GetObjectAcl
- Policy: PutBucketPolicy, GetBucketPolicy, DeleteBucketPolicy
- Other: PresignedGetObject, PresignedPutObject, PutBucketLifecycle

## Not Supported

- Bucket versioning
- Cross-region replication
- S3 Select

## Management API (api.hippius.com)

Full OpenAPI spec: https://api.hippius.com/?format=openapi

Authenticate with a bearer token obtained via OAuth (/auth/exchange/).

### Token management (programmatic S3 credential CRUD)

- GET  /objectstore/master-tokens/              List master tokens
- POST /objectstore/master-tokens/              Create master token
- POST /objectstore/master-tokens/{id}/revoke/  Revoke master token
- POST /objectstore/master-tokens/{id}/rotate/  Rotate master token secret
- Same endpoints exist for sub-tokens at /objectstore/sub-tokens/

### Billing & credits

- GET  /billing/credits/balance/                    Check credit balance
- GET  /billing/latest-tao-price/                   Get current TAO/USD price (public, no auth)
- POST /billing/stripe/create-checkout-session/     Create Stripe payment session ($20-$10,000)
- POST /billing/stripe/create-subscription/         Create recurring subscription
- GET  /billing/stripe/subscription-plans/          List available plans

### Pay with TAO (programmatic crypto top-up)

  Step 1: Create a crypto transaction
    curl -X POST https://api.hippius.com/billing/transactions/ \
      -H "Authorization: Token YOUR_TOKEN" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"payment_type": "crypto", "amount": "50.00", "currency": "TAO"}'
    Response includes "payment_address" — send TAO to this address on Bittensor.

  Step 2: Send TAO to the payment_address returned above.
    Credits are applied automatically once the transaction is confirmed on-chain.

  Step 3: Poll for confirmation
    curl https://api.hippius.com/billing/transactions/{id}/ \
      -H "Authorization: Token YOUR_TOKEN"
    Look for "status": "completed" and "substrate_success": true.

  Step 4: Verify credits
    curl https://api.hippius.com/billing/credits/balance/ \
      -H "Authorization: Token YOUR_TOKEN"

  Transaction endpoints:
  - POST /billing/transactions/                     Create payment (crypto or stripe)
  - GET  /billing/transactions/                     List all transactions
  - GET  /billing/transactions/{id}/                Get transaction status

### What requires the web console

Account creation at console.hippius.com (Google/GitHub OAuth, one-time step)

## Rate Limits

100 requests per minute per account

## Pricing

See https://hippius.com/pricing for current storage and bandwidth rates.

## Become a Storage Miner

Earn rewards by providing storage capacity to the Hippius network. See the miner setup guide:
https://docs.hippius.io/earn/arion/running-blockchain-node

## Support

If you have issues with any Hippius service, report them in one of these channels:

- Hippius Discord support channel: https://discord.com/channels/1298001698874327131/1442875352484548609
- Bittensor Discord (Subnet 75 / Hippius): https://discord.com/channels/799672011265015819/1349124437752152075
